subcodes.title: Commentary on Basitatu'l-Haqiqah
subcodes.first_line: Say: Knowledge, in the realm of contingent being, is identical with that which is known, and in the Divine Essence none knoweth it save He. Thus hath it been decreed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل ان العلم فی رتبه الامکان هو نفس المعلوم و فی الذات لایعلمه الا هو کذلک
subcodes.subjects: @procession; appearance of the Word from God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @knowledge; recognition of God
